```{r ora_heatmap_down}
# Filter for pathways significant in at least one timepoint
sig_ora_down_pathways <- ora_down_combined %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  pull(ID) %>%
  unique()

# Reshape for heatmap
ora_down_wide <- ora_down_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_ora_down_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, GeneRatio_numeric, timepoint) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = GeneRatio_numeric, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns
ora_down_wide <- ora_down_wide %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Create significance annotation matrix
sig_ora_down_matrix <- ora_down_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_ora_down_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, p.adjust, timepoint) %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p.adjust < 0.05, "*", "")) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, timepoint, sig) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = sig, values_fill = "") %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns to match ora_down_wide
sig_ora_down_matrix <- sig_ora_down_matrix %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Ensure row order matches
sig_ora_down_matrix <- sig_ora_down_matrix[rownames(ora_down_wide), ]

# Create heatmap
if (nrow(ora_down_wide) > 0) {
  p_ora_down_heatmap <- pheatmap(
    ora_down_wide,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    scale = "none",
    color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "blue"))(100),
    breaks = seq(0, max(ora_down_wide), length.out = 101),
    display_numbers = sig_ora_down_matrix,
    number_color = "black",
    fontsize_number = 14,
    main = "ORA Gene Ratio Across Timepoints - Downregulated (* = p.adjust < 0.05)",
    fontsize_row = 8,
    fontsize_col = 10,
    cellwidth = 40,
    cellheight = 12
  )

  # Save
  pdf(here("plots/ora_heatmap_downregulated_timecourse.pdf"), width = 8, height = 10)
  print(p_ora_down_heatmap)
  dev.off()

  cat("ORA heatmap for downregulated genes shows", nrow(ora_down_wide), "significant pathways\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant pathways found for ORA heatmap (downregulated genes)\n")
}
```

# GSEA: KEGG Pathways

Perform the same GSEA analysis using KEGG pathways instead of Hallmark pathways.

## Load KEGG gene sets

```{r load_kegg}
# Get KEGG pathways from MSigDB
kegg_pathways_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcategory = "CP:KEGG") %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

cat("Loaded MSigDB KEGG gene sets:\n")
cat("Number of pathways:", length(unique(kegg_pathways_df$gs_name)), "\n")
```

## GSEA: 1hr Hypoxia (KEGG)

```{r gsea_kegg_1hr}
# Run GSEA with KEGG pathways
set.seed(42)
gsea_kegg_1hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_1hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 20,
  maxGSSize = 1000,
  TERM2GENE = kegg_pathways_df
)

# Extract results
gsea_kegg_1hr_results <- gsea_kegg_1hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

# Round numeric columns
gsea_kegg_1hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_kegg_1hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA KEGG 1hr - Top pathways:\n")
print(gsea_kegg_1hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>% arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>% head(10))

# Dot plot for significant pathways
p_gsea_kegg_1hr <- ggplot(gsea_kegg_1hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05),
                      aes(y = reorder(ID, NES), x = NES, fill = p.adjust, size = leading_edge_count)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = FALSE, direction = -1) +
  labs(y = "Pathways",
       x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
       title = "GSEA: 1hr Hypoxia (KEGG Pathways)",
       size = "Number of Genes\nin Leading Edge",
       fill = "Adjusted P-value") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

print(p_gsea_kegg_1hr)
ggsave(here("plots/gsea_kegg_1hr.pdf"), p_gsea_kegg_1hr, width = 10, height = 8)
```

## GSEA: 4hr Hypoxia (KEGG)

```{r gsea_kegg_4hr}
# Run GSEA
set.seed(42)
gsea_kegg_4hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_4hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 20,
  maxGSSize = 1000,
  TERM2GENE = kegg_pathways_df
)

# Extract results
gsea_kegg_4hr_results <- gsea_kegg_4hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

gsea_kegg_4hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_kegg_4hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA KEGG 4hr - Top pathways:\n")
print(gsea_kegg_4hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>% arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>% head(10))

# Dot plot
p_gsea_kegg_4hr <- ggplot(gsea_kegg_4hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05),
                      aes(y = reorder(ID, NES), x = NES, fill = p.adjust, size = leading_edge_count)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = FALSE, direction = -1) +
  labs(y = "Pathways",
       x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
       title = "GSEA: 4hr Hypoxia (KEGG Pathways)",
       size = "Number of Genes\nin Leading Edge",
       fill = "Adjusted P-value") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

print(p_gsea_kegg_4hr)
ggsave(here("plots/gsea_kegg_4hr.pdf"), p_gsea_kegg_4hr, width = 10, height = 8)
```

## GSEA: 24hr Hypoxia (KEGG)

```{r gsea_kegg_24hr}
# Run GSEA
set.seed(42)
gsea_kegg_24hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_24hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 20,
  maxGSSize = 1000,
  TERM2GENE = kegg_pathways_df
)

# Extract results
gsea_kegg_24hr_results <- gsea_kegg_24hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

gsea_kegg_24hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_kegg_24hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA KEGG 24hr - Top pathways:\n")
print(gsea_kegg_24hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>% arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>% head(10))

# Dot plot
p_gsea_kegg_24hr <- ggplot(gsea_kegg_24hr_results %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05),
                       aes(y = reorder(ID, NES), x = NES, fill = p.adjust, size = leading_edge_count)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = FALSE, direction = -1) +
  labs(y = "Pathways",
       x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
       title = "GSEA: 24hr Hypoxia (KEGG Pathways)",
       size = "Number of Genes\nin Leading Edge",
       fill = "Adjusted P-value") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

print(p_gsea_kegg_24hr)
ggsave(here("plots/gsea_kegg_24hr.pdf"), p_gsea_kegg_24hr, width = 10, height = 8)
```

## Export KEGG GSEA results

```{r export_gsea_kegg}
# Compile all KEGG GSEA results
gsea_kegg_results_export <- list(
  "GSEA_KEGG_1hr" = gsea_kegg_1hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge),
  "GSEA_KEGG_4hr" = gsea_kegg_4hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge),
  "GSEA_KEGG_24hr" = gsea_kegg_24hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge)
)

write_xlsx(gsea_kegg_results_export, here("output/hypoxia_gsea_kegg.xlsx"))
cat("\nKEGG GSEA results exported to: output/hypoxia_gsea_kegg.xlsx\n")
```

## KEGG Heatmap: Pathway NES across timepoints

```{r gsea_kegg_heatmap}
# Combine results from all timepoints
gsea_kegg_combined <- bind_rows(
  gsea_kegg_1hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "1hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint),
  gsea_kegg_4hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "4hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint),
  gsea_kegg_24hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "24hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint)
)

# Filter for pathways significant in at least one timepoint
sig_kegg_pathways <- gsea_kegg_combined %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  pull(ID) %>%
  unique()

# Reshape for heatmap
gsea_kegg_wide <- gsea_kegg_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_kegg_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, timepoint) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = NES, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns
gsea_kegg_wide <- gsea_kegg_wide %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Create significance annotation matrix
sig_kegg_matrix <- gsea_kegg_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_kegg_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, p.adjust, timepoint) %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p.adjust < 0.05, "*", "")) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, timepoint, sig) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = sig, values_fill = "") %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns to match gsea_kegg_wide
sig_kegg_matrix <- sig_kegg_matrix %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Ensure row order matches
sig_kegg_matrix <- sig_kegg_matrix[rownames(gsea_kegg_wide), ]

# Create heatmap
if (nrow(gsea_kegg_wide) > 0) {
  p_kegg_heatmap <- pheatmap(
    gsea_kegg_wide,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    scale = "none",
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    breaks = seq(-3, 3, length.out = 101),
    display_numbers = sig_kegg_matrix,
    number_color = "black",
    fontsize_number = 14,
    main = "GSEA NES Across Timepoints - KEGG (* = p.adjust < 0.05)",
    fontsize_row = 8,
    fontsize_col = 10,
    cellwidth = 40,
    cellheight = 12
  )

  # Save
  pdf(here("plots/gsea_kegg_heatmap_timecourse.pdf"), width = 8, height = 10)
  print(p_kegg_heatmap)
  dev.off()

  cat("KEGG heatmap shows", nrow(gsea_kegg_wide), "significant pathways\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant KEGG pathways found for heatmap\n")
}
```

# GSEA: Custom MDA-MB-231 Gene Sets

Perform GSEA analysis using custom gene sets derived from MDA-MB-231 cell line experiments, including eIF3d/eIF3e knockdown effects on translation efficiency under normoxia and hypoxia conditions.

## Load Custom Gene Sets

```{r load_custom_genesets}
# Load custom gene sets from CSV
custom_genesets_raw <- read_csv(here("accessories", "all_combined_sigs_12_9_25.csv"))

# Filter to MDA-MB-231 gene sets and create TERM2GENE format
custom_genesets <- custom_genesets_raw %>%
  filter(str_starts(gs_name, "MDA-MB-231_")) %>%
  # Exclude overlap gene sets
  filter(!str_detect(gs_name, "overlap")) %>%
  # Exclude genes where db_gene_symbol is just an ENSG ID (no standard gene symbol)
  filter(!str_starts(db_gene_symbol, "ENSG")) %>%
  # Remove any NA values in gene symbols
  filter(!is.na(db_gene_symbol), db_gene_symbol != "") %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, db_gene_symbol) %>%
  distinct()

cat("Loaded custom MDA-MB-231 gene sets:\n")
cat("Number of gene sets:", length(unique(custom_genesets$gs_name)), "\n")
cat("Total gene-pathway associations:", nrow(custom_genesets), "\n")

# Show gene set size distribution
geneset_sizes <- custom_genesets %>%
  group_by(gs_name) %>%
  summarise(size = n()) %>%
  arrange(size)

cat("\nGene set size distribution:\n")
cat("Min:", min(geneset_sizes$size), "\n")
cat("Max:", max(geneset_sizes$size), "\n")
cat("Mean:", round(mean(geneset_sizes$size), 1), "\n")
cat("Median:", median(geneset_sizes$size), "\n")
```

## GSEA: 1hr Hypoxia (Custom Gene Sets)

```{r gsea_custom_1hr}
# Run GSEA with custom gene sets (using pre-existing ranked list)
set.seed(42)
gsea_custom_1hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_1hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 10,     # Lower than Hallmark/KEGG to capture smaller custom sets
  maxGSSize = 1000,   # Filter out very large sets (2500-gene sets)
  TERM2GENE = custom_genesets
)

# Extract results
gsea_custom_1hr_results <- gsea_custom_1hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

# Round numeric columns
gsea_custom_1hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_custom_1hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA Custom 1hr - Top pathways:\n")
cat("Total pathways tested:", nrow(gsea_custom_1hr_results), "\n")
cat("Significant pathways (p.adjust < 0.05):",
    sum(gsea_custom_1hr_results$p.adjust < 0.05), "\n\n")
print(gsea_custom_1hr_results %>%
        filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
        arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
        head(15))
```

## GSEA: 4hr Hypoxia (Custom Gene Sets)

```{r gsea_custom_4hr}
# Run GSEA with custom gene sets
set.seed(42)
gsea_custom_4hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_4hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 10,
  maxGSSize = 1000,
  TERM2GENE = custom_genesets
)

# Extract results
gsea_custom_4hr_results <- gsea_custom_4hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

gsea_custom_4hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_custom_4hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA Custom 4hr - Top pathways:\n")
cat("Total pathways tested:", nrow(gsea_custom_4hr_results), "\n")
cat("Significant pathways (p.adjust < 0.05):",
    sum(gsea_custom_4hr_results$p.adjust < 0.05), "\n\n")
print(gsea_custom_4hr_results %>%
        filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
        arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
        head(15))
```

## GSEA: 24hr Hypoxia (Custom Gene Sets)

```{r gsea_custom_24hr}
# Run GSEA with custom gene sets
set.seed(42)
gsea_custom_24hr <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_list_24hr,
  eps = 0,
  pAdjustMethod = "fdr",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  minGSSize = 10,
  maxGSSize = 1000,
  TERM2GENE = custom_genesets
)

# Extract results
gsea_custom_24hr_results <- gsea_custom_24hr@result %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, pvalue, p.adjust, setSize, core_enrichment) %>%
  rename("leading_edge" = core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_count = sapply(strsplit(leading_edge, "/"), length),
         leading_edge_fraction = leading_edge_count / setSize)

gsea_custom_24hr_results[] <- lapply(gsea_custom_24hr_results, function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) round(x, 4) else x
})

cat("GSEA Custom 24hr - Top pathways:\n")
cat("Total pathways tested:", nrow(gsea_custom_24hr_results), "\n")
cat("Significant pathways (p.adjust < 0.05):",
    sum(gsea_custom_24hr_results$p.adjust < 0.05), "\n\n")
print(gsea_custom_24hr_results %>%
        filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
        arrange(desc(abs(NES))) %>%
        head(15))
```

## Export Custom GSEA Results

```{r export_gsea_custom}
# Compile all custom GSEA results
gsea_custom_results_export <- list(
  "GSEA_Custom_1hr" = gsea_custom_1hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge),
  "GSEA_Custom_4hr" = gsea_custom_4hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge),
  "GSEA_Custom_24hr" = gsea_custom_24hr_results %>% dplyr::select(-leading_edge)
)

write_xlsx(gsea_custom_results_export, here("output/hypoxia_gsea_custom.xlsx"))
cat("\nCustom GSEA results exported to: output/hypoxia_gsea_custom.xlsx\n")
```

## Custom Gene Sets Heatmap: Pathway NES across timepoints

```{r gsea_custom_heatmap}
# Combine results from all timepoints
gsea_custom_combined <- bind_rows(
  gsea_custom_1hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "1hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint),
  gsea_custom_4hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "4hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint),
  gsea_custom_24hr_results %>% mutate(timepoint = "24hr") %>% dplyr::select(ID, NES, p.adjust, timepoint)
)

# Filter for pathways significant in at least one timepoint
sig_custom_pathways <- gsea_custom_combined %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  pull(ID) %>%
  unique()

cat("Found", length(sig_custom_pathways), "pathways significant in at least one timepoint\n")

# Reshape for heatmap
gsea_custom_wide <- gsea_custom_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_custom_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, NES, timepoint) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = NES, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns
gsea_custom_wide <- gsea_custom_wide %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Sort rows by 1hr NES (groups positive and negative enrichments together)
gsea_custom_wide <- gsea_custom_wide[order(gsea_custom_wide$`1hr`, decreasing = TRUE), ]

# Create significance annotation matrix
sig_custom_matrix <- gsea_custom_combined %>%
  filter(ID %in% sig_custom_pathways) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, p.adjust, timepoint) %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p.adjust < 0.05, "*", "")) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, timepoint, sig) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = sig, values_fill = "") %>%
  column_to_rownames("ID")

# Reorder columns to match gsea_custom_wide
sig_custom_matrix <- sig_custom_matrix %>% dplyr::select(`1hr`, `4hr`, `24hr`)

# Ensure row order matches
sig_custom_matrix <- sig_custom_matrix[rownames(gsea_custom_wide), ]

# Create heatmap with dynamic height
if (nrow(gsea_custom_wide) > 0) {
  # Calculate height based on number of pathways (12 pixels per row + margin)
  heatmap_height <- max(8, min(20, 0.25 * nrow(gsea_custom_wide) + 2))

  p_custom_heatmap <- pheatmap(
    gsea_custom_wide,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    scale = "none",
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    breaks = seq(-3, 3, length.out = 101),
    display_numbers = sig_custom_matrix,
    number_color = "black",
    fontsize_number = 14,
    main = "GSEA NES Across Timepoints - Custom MDA-MB-231 Gene Sets (* = p.adjust < 0.05)",
    fontsize_row = 8,
    fontsize_col = 10,
    cellwidth = 40,
    cellheight = 12
  )

  # Save with dynamic height
  pdf(here("plots/gsea_custom_heatmap_timecourse.pdf"), width = 8, height = heatmap_height)
  print(p_custom_heatmap)
  dev.off()

  cat("Custom gene sets heatmap shows", nrow(gsea_custom_wide), "significant pathways\n")
  cat("Heatmap saved to: plots/gsea_custom_heatmap_timecourse.pdf\n")
} else {
  cat("No significant custom pathways found for heatmap\n")
}
```

# Comprehensive Analysis: Hypoxia Response with Knockdown Effects


## Load Translation Category Data

```{r load_translation_categories}
# Load hypoxia response categories
hyp_1hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_1hr.csv"))
hyp_4hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_4hr.csv"))
hyp_24hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_24hr.csv"))

# Load eIF3d knockdown categories
si3d_norm_1hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1hr.csv"))
si3d_norm_4hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_4hr.csv"))
si3d_norm_24hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_24hr.csv"))
si3d_hyp_1hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv"))
si3d_hyp_4hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_4hr.csv"))
si3d_hyp_24hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_24hr.csv"))

# Load eIF3e knockdown categories
si3e_norm_1hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1hr.csv"))
si3e_norm_4hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_normoxia_4hr.csv"))
si3e_norm_24hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_normoxia_24hr.csv"))
si3e_hyp_1hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv"))
si3e_hyp_4hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_4hr.csv"))
si3e_hyp_24hr <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_24hr.csv"))

# Get gene symbols from deseq_1hr (already loaded)
gene_symbols <- deseq_1hr %>% dplyr::select(gene_id, symbol)

cat("Loaded all translation category data\n")
```

## Summary of RNA, Ribo, and TE Changes Across Timepoints

```{r summary_changes_hypoxia}
# Function to count significant changes
count_changes <- function(df, lfc_threshold = 0) {
  data.frame(
    RNA_up = sum(df$rna_padj < 0.05 & df$rna_lfc > lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    RNA_down = sum(df$rna_padj < 0.05 & df$rna_lfc < -lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ribo_up = sum(df$ribo_padj < 0.05 & df$ribo_lfc > lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ribo_down = sum(df$ribo_padj < 0.05 & df$ribo_lfc < -lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    TE_up = sum(df$te_padj < 0.05 & df$te_lfc > lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    TE_down = sum(df$te_padj < 0.05 & df$te_lfc < -lfc_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# Count with padj < 0.05 and any LFC (LFC != 0)
cat("=== Changes with padj < 0.05 and LFC > 0 or < 0 ===\n\n")
changes_1hr <- count_changes(hyp_1hr, lfc_threshold = 0)
changes_4hr <- count_changes(hyp_4hr, lfc_threshold = 0)
changes_24hr <- count_changes(hyp_24hr, lfc_threshold = 0)

summary_table <- rbind(
  data.frame(Timepoint = "1hr", changes_1hr),
  data.frame(Timepoint = "4hr", changes_4hr),
  data.frame(Timepoint = "24hr", changes_24hr)
)

print(summary_table)

cat("\n=== Changes with padj < 0.05 and LFC > 0.5 or < -0.5 ===\n\n")
changes_1hr_lfc05 <- count_changes(hyp_1hr, lfc_threshold = 0.5)
changes_4hr_lfc05 <- count_changes(hyp_4hr, lfc_threshold = 0.5)
changes_24hr_lfc05 <- count_changes(hyp_24hr, lfc_threshold = 0.5)

summary_table_lfc05 <- rbind(
  data.frame(Timepoint = "1hr", changes_1hr_lfc05),
  data.frame(Timepoint = "4hr", changes_4hr_lfc05),
  data.frame(Timepoint = "24hr", changes_24hr_lfc05)
)

print(summary_table_lfc05)
```

### Visualize Changes as Barplots

```{r barplots_changes}
# Reshape data for plotting - LFC > 0 (RNA and Ribo only)
plot_data_rna_ribo <- summary_table %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Timepoint, names_to = "Change_Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  separate(Change_Type, into = c("Data_Type", "Direction"), sep = "_") %>%
  filter(Data_Type %in% c("RNA", "Ribo")) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("1hr", "4hr", "24hr")),
    Data_Type = factor(Data_Type, levels = c("RNA", "Ribo")),
    Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("up", "down")),
    Direction = recode(Direction, "up" = "Up", "down" = "Down"),
    Type_Direction = interaction(Data_Type, Direction, sep = "\n"),
    Type_Direction = factor(Type_Direction, levels = c("RNA\nUp", "RNA\nDown", "Ribo\nUp", "Ribo\nDown"))
  )

# Create barplot for RNA and Ribo - LFC > 0
p1_rna_ribo <- ggplot(plot_data_rna_ribo, aes(x = Type_Direction, y = Count, fill = Data_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#CC79A7", "Ribo" = "#0072B2")) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "RNA and Ribo Changes in Hypoxia (padj < 0.05, LFC > 0)",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Genes",
    fill = "Data Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(p1_rna_ribo)

# Reshape data for plotting - LFC > 0 (TE only)
plot_data_te <- summary_table %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Timepoint, names_to = "Change_Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  separate(Change_Type, into = c("Data_Type", "Direction"), sep = "_") %>%
  filter(Data_Type == "TE") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("1hr", "4hr", "24hr")),
    Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("up", "down")),
    Direction = recode(Direction, "up" = "Up", "down" = "Down"),
    Type_Direction = interaction(Data_Type, Direction, sep = "\n"),
    Type_Direction = factor(Type_Direction, levels = c("TE\nUp", "TE\nDown"))
  )

# Create barplot for TE - LFC > 0
p1_te <- ggplot(plot_data_te, aes(x = Type_Direction, y = Count, fill = Data_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TE" = "#009E73")) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "TE Changes in Hypoxia (padj < 0.05, LFC > 0)",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Genes",
    fill = "Data Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(p1_te)

# Reshape data for plotting - LFC > 0.5 (RNA and Ribo only)
plot_data_rna_ribo_lfc05 <- summary_table_lfc05 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Timepoint, names_to = "Change_Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  separate(Change_Type, into = c("Data_Type", "Direction"), sep = "_") %>%
  filter(Data_Type %in% c("RNA", "Ribo")) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("1hr", "4hr", "24hr")),
    Data_Type = factor(Data_Type, levels = c("RNA", "Ribo")),
    Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("up", "down")),
    Direction = recode(Direction, "up" = "Up", "down" = "Down"),
    Type_Direction = interaction(Data_Type, Direction, sep = "\n"),
    Type_Direction = factor(Type_Direction, levels = c("RNA\nUp", "RNA\nDown", "Ribo\nUp", "Ribo\nDown"))
  )

# Create barplot for RNA and Ribo - LFC > 0.5
p2_rna_ribo <- ggplot(plot_data_rna_ribo_lfc05, aes(x = Type_Direction, y = Count, fill = Data_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#CC79A7", "Ribo" = "#0072B2")) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "RNA and Ribo Changes in Hypoxia (padj < 0.05, |LFC| > 0.5)",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Genes",
    fill = "Data Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(p2_rna_ribo)

# Reshape data for plotting - LFC > 0.5 (TE only)
plot_data_te_lfc05 <- summary_table_lfc05 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Timepoint, names_to = "Change_Type", values_to = "Count") %>%
  separate(Change_Type, into = c("Data_Type", "Direction"), sep = "_") %>%
  filter(Data_Type == "TE") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("1hr", "4hr", "24hr")),
    Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("up", "down")),
    Direction = recode(Direction, "up" = "Up", "down" = "Down"),
    Type_Direction = interaction(Data_Type, Direction, sep = "\n"),
    Type_Direction = factor(Type_Direction, levels = c("TE\nUp", "TE\nDown"))
  )

# Create barplot for TE - LFC > 0.5
p2_te <- ggplot(plot_data_te_lfc05, aes(x = Type_Direction, y = Count, fill = Data_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TE" = "#009E73")) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "TE Changes in Hypoxia (padj < 0.05, |LFC| > 0.5)",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Genes",
    fill = "Data Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(p2_te)

# Save plots
ggsave(here("plots/hypoxia_rna_ribo_changes_lfc0_barplot.pdf"), p1_rna_ribo, width = 12, height = 5)
ggsave(here("plots/hypoxia_te_changes_lfc0_barplot.pdf"), p1_te, width = 12, height = 5)
ggsave(here("plots/hypoxia_rna_ribo_changes_lfc05_barplot.pdf"), p2_rna_ribo, width = 12, height = 5)
ggsave(here("plots/hypoxia_te_changes_lfc05_barplot.pdf"), p2_te, width = 12, height = 5)
```

## Get TE-Regulated Genes from Hypoxia Response

```{r get_te_regulated_genes}
# Get genes with TE regulation (Exclusive, Buffered, TE_only) at any timepoint
te_regulated_genes <- bind_rows(
  hyp_1hr %>% filter(category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")) %>% dplyr::select(gene_id),
  hyp_4hr %>% filter(category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")) %>% dplyr::select(gene_id),
  hyp_24hr %>% filter(category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")) %>% dplyr::select(gene_id)
)

# Get unique gene list
te_regulated_gene_ids <- unique(te_regulated_genes$gene_id)

cat("Total genes with TE regulation in hypoxia response:", length(te_regulated_gene_ids), "\n")
cat("Breakdown by timepoint:\n")
cat("  1hr:", sum(hyp_1hr$category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")), "genes\n")
cat("  4hr:", sum(hyp_4hr$category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")), "genes\n")
cat("  24hr:", sum(hyp_24hr$category %in% c("Exclusive", "Buffered", "TE_only")), "genes\n")
```

## Create Helper Function

```{r helper_function}
# Function to determine if TE is significantly changed
# TE is significant in categories: Exclusive, Buffered, TE_only
# TE is NOT significant in: Forwarded, Not_sig
is_te_not_significant <- function(category) {
  category %in% c("Forwarded", "Not_sig")
}
```

## Build Comprehensive Table

```{r build_table}
# Start with TE-regulated genes from hypoxia response
analysis_table <- data.frame(gene_id = te_regulated_gene_ids)

colnames(analysis_table)

# Add gene symbols
analysis_table <- analysis_table %>%
  left_join(gene_symbols, by = "gene_id")

# Add hypoxia response data (include LFC and TE padj only)
analysis_table <- analysis_table %>%
  left_join(hyp_1hr %>% 
            rename(hyp_1hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, hyp_1hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, hyp_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   hyp_1hr_category = category,
                   te_padj_1hr = te_padj),
            by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(hyp_4hr %>%
            rename(hyp_4hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, hyp_4hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, hyp_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                    hyp_4hr_category = category,
                    te_padj_4hr = te_padj),
            by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(hyp_24hr %>%
            rename(hyp_24hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, hyp_24hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, hyp_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                 hyp_24hr_category = category,
                 te_padj_24hr = te_padj),
            by = "gene_id")

```

```{r add_si3d_data}
# Add eIF3d knockdown data (include LFC and TE padj only)
analysis_table <- analysis_table %>%
  left_join(si3d_norm_1hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_norm_1hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_norm_1hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_norm_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3d_norm_1hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3d_norm_4hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_norm_4hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_norm_4hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_norm_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3d_norm_4hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3d_norm_24hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_norm_24hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_norm_24hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_norm_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3d_norm_24hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3d_hyp_1hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_hyp_1hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_hyp_1hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_hyp_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3d_hyp_1hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3d_hyp_4hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_hyp_4hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_hyp_4hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_hyp_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                    si3d_hyp_4hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3d_hyp_24hr %>% 
            rename(si3d_hyp_24hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3d_hyp_24hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3d_hyp_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3d_hyp_24hr_category = category), by = "gene_id")

```

```{r add_si3e_data}
# Add eIF3e knockdown data (include LFC and TE padj only)
analysis_table <- analysis_table %>%
  left_join(si3e_norm_1hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_norm_1hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_norm_1hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_norm_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                  si3e_norm_1hr_category = category,
                  si3e_norm_1hr_padj = te_padj), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3e_norm_4hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_norm_4hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_norm_4hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_norm_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3e_norm_4hr_category = category,
                   si3e_norm_4hr_padj = te_padj), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3e_norm_24hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_norm_24hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_norm_24hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_norm_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                  si3e_norm_24hr_category = category,
                  si3e_norm_24hr_padj = te_padj), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3e_hyp_1hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_hyp_1hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_hyp_1hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_hyp_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                    si3e_hyp_1hr_category = category), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3e_hyp_4hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_hyp_4hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_hyp_4hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_hyp_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3e_hyp_4hr_category = category,
                   si3e_hyp_4hr_padj=te_padj), by = "gene_id") %>%
  left_join(si3e_hyp_24hr %>% 
            rename(si3e_hyp_24hr_rna_lfc = rna_lfc, si3e_hyp_24hr_ribo_lfc = ribo_lfc, si3e_hyp_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc,
                   si3e_hyp_24hr_category = category,
                   si3e_hyp_24hr_padj=te_padj), by = "gene_id")

cat("Total columns in analysis table:", ncol(analysis_table), "\n")
```

## Add Interpretable Columns

```{r add_interpretable_columns}
# Add columns indicating TE regulation status
analysis_table <- analysis_table %>%
  mutate(
    # Hypoxia response TE direction
    hyp_1hr_te_dir = case_when(
      is.na(hyp_1hr_te_lfc) ~ "NA",
      hyp_1hr_te_lfc > 0 ~ "Up",
      hyp_1hr_te_lfc < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "No change"
    ),
    hyp_4hr_te_dir = case_when(
      is.na(hyp_4hr_te_lfc) ~ "NA",
      hyp_4hr_te_lfc > 0 ~ "Up",
      hyp_4hr_te_lfc < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "No change"
    ),
    hyp_24hr_te_dir = case_when(
      is.na(hyp_24hr_te_lfc) ~ "NA",
      hyp_24hr_te_lfc > 0 ~ "Up",
      hyp_24hr_te_lfc < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "No change"
    ),

    # eIF3d knockdown - TE not significant?
    si3d_norm_1hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_norm_1hr_category),
    si3d_norm_4hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_norm_4hr_category),
    si3d_norm_24hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_norm_24hr_category),
    si3d_hyp_1hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_hyp_1hr_category),
    si3d_hyp_4hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_hyp_4hr_category),
    si3d_hyp_24hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3d_hyp_24hr_category),

    # eIF3e knockdown - TE not significant?
    si3e_norm_1hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_norm_1hr_category),
    si3e_norm_4hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_norm_4hr_category),
    si3e_norm_24hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_norm_24hr_category),
    si3e_hyp_1hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_hyp_1hr_category),
    si3e_hyp_4hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_hyp_4hr_category),
    si3e_hyp_24hr_te_not_sig = is_te_not_significant(si3e_hyp_24hr_category)
  )

cat("Added interpretable columns\n")
```


genes_of_interest


```{r}
genes_of_interest <- analysis_table |> 
  filter(hyp_1hr_category=="Exclusive" & hyp_1hr_te_lfc>0) |> 
  filter(hyp_4hr_te_lfc > 0) |> 
    filter(hyp_24hr_te_lfc > 0)


```



# Effect of knockdown on hypoxic response

Read in deseq results

```{r}
#sictrl
hyp_response_deseq_1hr <-read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_1hr.csv")) |> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
  rename(sictrl_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, sictrl_1hr_te_padj = te_padj)
hyp_response_deseq_4hr<-read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_4hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
    rename(sictrl_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, sictrl_4hr_te_padj = te_padj)

hyp_response_deseq_24hr<-read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_24hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
    rename(sictrl_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, sictrl_24hr_te_padj = te_padj)


#3e
hyp_response_deseq_1hr_3e_kd <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_1hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
    rename(si3e_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3e_1hr_te_padj = te_padj)

hyp_response_deseq_4hr_3e_kd<- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_4hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
      rename(si3e_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3e_4hr_te_padj = te_padj)

hyp_response_deseq_24hr_3e_kd<- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3e_24hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
      rename(si3e_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3e_24hr_te_padj = te_padj)


#3d
hyp_response_deseq_1hr_3d_kd<- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_1hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
      rename(si3d_1hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3d_1hr_te_padj = te_padj)

hyp_response_deseq_4hr_3d_kd<- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_4hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
        rename(si3d_4hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3d_4hr_te_padj = te_padj)

hyp_response_deseq_24hr_3d_kd<- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_24hr.csv"))|> 
  dplyr::select(gene_id, te_lfc, te_padj) |> 
        rename(si3d_24hr_te_lfc = te_lfc, si3d_24hr_te_padj = te_padj)


all_hypoxic_response <-hyp_response_deseq_1hr |> 
  left_join(hyp_response_deseq_4hr) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_24hr) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_1hr_3e_kd) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_4hr_3e_kd) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_24hr_3e_kd) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_1hr_3d_kd) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_4hr_3d_kd) |> 
    left_join(hyp_response_deseq_24hr_3d_kd)

  

head(all_hypoxic_response)
```




# 1 hr - 3e KD

```{r}

colnames(all_hypoxic_response)

sig_sictrl_1hr <- all_hypoxic_response %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_padj <0.05)


#counts sig_sictrl
ctrl_down <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_lfc < 0) %>%
  nrow()

ctrl_up <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_lfc > 0) %>%
  nrow()




#counts si3e
si3e_down <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(si3e_1hr_te_lfc < 0) %>%
  filter(si3e_1hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%
  nrow()

si3e_up <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(si3e_1hr_te_lfc > 0) %>%
  filter(si3e_1hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%
  nrow()


# Create summary table (transposed with up/down as rows)
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Direction = c("Up", "Down"),
  `si-CTRL` = c(ctrl_up, ctrl_down),
  `si-eIF3e` = c(si3e_up, si3e_down),
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Create table grob
table_grob <- gridExtra::tableGrob(summary_table, rows = NULL, theme = gridExtra::ttheme_minimal(base_size = 9))

scatter_3e_1hr_plot <- ggplot(data = sig_sictrl_1hr, aes(x = sictrl_1hr_te_lfc, y = si3e_1hr_te_lfc)) +
  ylim(-2,2) +
  xlim(-2,2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_point(alpha=.25) +
  ylab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-eIF3e LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
  xlab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-CTRL LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
    # theme_cowplot(font_size = 9)+
  theme_prism()

scatter_3e_1hr_plot <- ggMarginal(scatter_3e_1hr_plot, type = "histogram",
           xparams = list(binwidth = .1, fill = "grey"),
           yparams = list(binwidth = .1, fill = "#56B4E9")
           )

# Combine plot and table
scatter_3e_1hr <- cowplot::plot_grid(scatter_3e_1hr_plot, table_grob, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.15))

scatter_3e_1hr

ggsave(filename= here("plots/si3e_1hr_response.pdf"), scatter_3e_1hr, height=4, width=4)



```




# 1 hr - 3d KD

```{r}

colnames(all_hypoxic_response)

sig_sictrl_1hr <- all_hypoxic_response %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_padj <0.05)


#counts sig_sictrl
ctrl_down <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_lfc < 0) %>%
  nrow()

ctrl_up <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(sictrl_1hr_te_lfc > 0) %>%
  nrow()




#counts si3d
si3d_down <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(si3d_1hr_te_lfc < 0) %>%
  filter(si3d_1hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%
  nrow()

si3d_up <- sig_sictrl_1hr %>%
  filter(si3d_1hr_te_lfc > 0) %>%
  filter(si3d_1hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%
  nrow()


# Create summary table (transposed with up/down as rows)
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Direction = c("Up", "Down"),
  `si-CTRL` = c(ctrl_up, ctrl_down),
  `si-eIF3d` = c(si3d_up, si3d_down),
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Create table grob
table_grob <- gridExtra::tableGrob(summary_table, rows = NULL, theme = gridExtra::ttheme_minimal(base_size = 9))

scatter_3d_1hr_plot <- ggplot(data = sig_sictrl_1hr, aes(x = sictrl_1hr_te_lfc, y = si3d_1hr_te_lfc)) +
  ylim(-2,2) +
  xlim(-2,2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_point(alpha=.25) +
  ylab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-eIF3d LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
  xlab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-CTRL LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
    # theme_cowplot(font_size = 9)+
  theme_prism()

scatter_3d_1hr_plot <- ggMarginal(scatter_3d_1hr_plot, type = "histogram",
           xparams = list(binwidth = .1, fill = "grey"),
           yparams = list(binwidth = .1, fill = "#E69F00")
           )

# Combine plot and table
scatter_3d_1hr <- cowplot::plot_grid(scatter_3d_1hr_plot, table_grob, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.15))

scatter_3d_1hr

ggsave(filename= here("plots/si3d_1hr_response.pdf"), scatter_3d_1hr, height=4, width=4)



```

```{r}
#counts sig_sictrl
```

```{r}
  filter(sictrl_24hr_te_lfc < 0) %>%

  filter(si3e_24hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%
  nrow()

  filter(si3e_24hr_te_padj < 0.05) %>%

  Direction = c("Up", "Down"),
  `si-CTRL` = c(ctrl_up, ctrl_down),
  `si-eIF3e` = c(si3e_up, si3e_down),
  check.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
  nrow()

  Direction = c("Up", "Down"),
  `si-CTRL` = c(ctrl_up, ctrl_down),
  `si-eIF3d` = c(si3d_up, si3d_down),
  check.names = FALSE

  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey") +
  geom_point(alpha=.25) +
  ylab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-eIF3d LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
  xlab(bquote(Log[2]~"si-CTRL LFC"~"TE: hypoxia vs normoxia")) +
    # theme_cowplot(font_size = 9)+

           xparams = list(binwidth = .1, fill = "grey"),
```
